title: AMP Superannuation Limited and N.M. Superannuation Proprietary Limited (AMP Super) — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: APRA accepted a court enforceable undertaking from AMP Superannuation Limited and N.M. Superannuation Proprietary Limited (collectively AMP Super, which controls two superannuation funds with estimated net assets of $116 billion) to address governance and risk-management deficiencies, following a lengthy APRA investigation into past conduct that APRA believes led to a number of potential breaches of the Superannuation Industry (Supervision) Act 1993.
scope: Subject of an APRA court enforceable undertaking addressing governance and risk-management deficiencies; Undertaking followed a lengthy APRA investigation into past conduct believed to involve potential SIS Act breaches; Trustee entities control superannuation funds with estimated net assets of $116 billion
